info.title: Workhorse API
info.description: Local-first runtime API for the Workhorse multi-workspace kanban.

post.summary: Open a local folder picker for a workspace root

200.description: Selected workspace root path, or null when canceled

501.description: Folder picker is unavailable on this platform

get.summary: List Git refs for a workspace
Get Git sync status for a workspace

post.summary: Pull latest changes from origin for a workspace
Send a user message to the task's Codex session
Create a task plan and move it to todo
Send feedback to refine a task plan via session resume
Request a Claude review for a task in review

get.summary: Get the file diff for a task worktree

post.summary: Post a human message into a team task thread

PartialRecordRunnerTypenumber.description: Make all properties in T optional

dependencies.description: Task IDs that must be "done" before this task can start

teamId.description: When set, this task belongs to an agent team.

parentTaskId.description: When set, this task is a subtask created by a team coordinator.

teamAgentId.description: The TeamAgent.id responsible for this subtask.

Recordstringstring.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

PickAppStateschemaVersion.description: From T, pick a set of properties whose keys are in the union K

prStrategy.description: Strategy for creating pull requests from subtask branches.

id.description: Unique agent identifier within the team (nanoid).

parentTaskId.description: Parent team task that owns this execution thread.

taskId.description: The task this message is associated with (subtask or parent task).

agentName.description: Name of the agent or user that sent the message.

senderType.description: Whether the message was sent by an agent, human, or the system.

messageType.description: Semantic message category for prompt injection and UI rendering.
